death.attack.boop.player: %s was peppered a thousand times by %s
desc.spear.enchanted_1: [Debug] If the dash does not work, right-click while sneaking to reset the timers.
desc.spear.unenchanted_1: Holding right-click allows the Envinium Spear to parry attacks,
desc.spear.unenchanted_2: knocking entities back and giving the user an attack buff.
desc.spear.unenchanted_3: Attacking in a certain time frame will increase the damage by 50%.
effect.rinvenium.sparked.desc: Deals low damage rapidly and can chain to nearby players if they are wet.
enchantment.rinvenium.rush.desc:
The Envinium Spear will charge over time, 
allowing the user to rush forward at great speeds on right-click.
item.rinvenium.aurio_ingot.desc1: Obtained by [R-Click] a Superheated Aurio Ingot
item.rinvenium.aurio_ingot.desc2: on a water cauldron or source block.
item.rinvenium.envinia_ingot.desc1: Obtained by [R-Click] a Superheated Envinia Ingot
item.rinvenium.envinia_ingot.desc2: on a water cauldron or source block.
item.rinvenium.envixius_ingot.desc1: Obtained by [R-Click] a Superheated Envixius Ingot
item.rinvenium.envixius_ingot.desc2: on a water cauldron or source block.
item.rinvenium.envixius_plate.desc1: Obtained by [R-Click] a Superheated Envixius Plate
item.rinvenium.envixius_plate.desc2: on a water cauldron or source block.
item.rinvenium.ion_cell.desc1: Obtained by dropping a battery on a powered beacon.
item.rinvenium.superheated_aurio_ingot.d: Obtained by dropping a Gold Ingot and Copper Ingot
into an empty cauldron above a soul flame.
item.rinvenium.superheated_envinia_ingot: Obtained by dropping a Netherite Scrap and Iron Ingot
into an empty cauldron above a soul flame.
item.rinvenium.superheated_envixius_ingo: Obtained by dropping an Envinia Ingot and Aurio Ingot
into an empty cauldron above a soul flame.
item.rinvenium.superheated_envixius_plat: Obtained by having an anvil fall on Superheated Envixius Ingot.
sound.rinvenium.hail_of_the_gods.shoot: Hail of the Gods goes BRRRTT
